markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To align the team on company vision, review recent performance, and share 2026 goals.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Vision:** The company's strategy addresses a fundamental market shift where AI agents now influence buyers. The website is the key asset for brands to achieve compounding growth and leverage by influencing these three audiences: buyers, agents, and training bots.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [**Ecosystem:** A three-part ecosystem is being built to capitalize on this shift:](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
      - [**Check That:** A new product for AI visibility data, serving as a lead-gen engine.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [**OS (formerly Atlas):** The core platform for managing website growth, decoupling services from the product.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
      - [**Output AI:** An open-source framework for building agentic workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [**Performance:** Recent churn (e.g., Surge, Okta) created a \~$2.7M revenue gap. The team is closing this with strong sales momentum (10 new deals in 30 days) and a recovery in Strategy Sprint conversion rates to 80-85%.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=1963.0)
  - [**Goals:** The 2026 target is to grow from $12M to $34M ARR. This requires maintaining high sprint conversion and a strong burn multiple to fund the ecosystem's infrastructure, data, and platform development.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)

## Topics

### Company Vision & Strategy

  - [**Market Shift:** AI agents are fundamentally changing buyer behavior, making the website an existential asset.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [**Three Audiences to Influence:**](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
    1.  [**Buyers:** Direct engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
    2.  [**AI Agents:** Influence the answers they provide.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
    3.  [**Training Bots:** Shape the models that learn about the brand.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [**The Core Job:** Drive compounding growth through the website by:](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
      - [**Managing:** Keeping pages organized, current, and healthy.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
      - [**Creating:** Expanding the surface area of influence (50k+ pages).](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
      - [**Optimizing:** Ensuring every page is fresh and converting.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
  - [**The Solution:** An AI-powered system is required, as manual execution is impossible. The system must provide strategic guidance, get smarter with every output, and deliver growth across all three audiences.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)

### Business & Sales Updates

  - [**Recent Churn:**](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
      - [**Surge:** $2.7M contract lost. Work was non-core (e.g., sales enablement), validating the company's strategic focus.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=1968.0)
      - [**Okta:** Similar non-core work.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=1968.0)
      - [**Superhuman:** Lost post-acquisition to Grammarly, which chose AirOps. This highlights the need for a platform that gives clients more control.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=2027.0)
  - [**Sales Momentum:**](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=2363.0)
      - [**10 new deals closed in 30 days,** including Talon One ($135M Series B), Tavis ($40M Series B), and Jama Software (acquired for \>$1B).](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=2363.0)
  - [**Upsell Success:**](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=2532.0)
      - [**Webflow:** Success with integration pages led to an upsell for a code components library.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=2532.0)
      - [**Lovable:** Strong growth ($45k in purchases) drove an upsell from 5 to 25 guides/week. A publishing bot built by Nico enables this scale.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=2577.0)

### Check That Launch & Product Updates

  - [**Launch Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=2668.0)
      - [**Viral Launch:** Marcel's X post generated 1.4M impressions.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=2684.0)
      - [**Strong Signups:** \~300 signups from companies like iTouch and HC Insights.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=2684.0)
      - [**Traffic Boost:** Significant, sustained organic traffic to the website.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)
  - [**Product Development:**](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=2820.0)
      - [**Rapid Iteration:** The product evolved from a simple "hot site" in August to a full platform, driven by real-world service-side use.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=2851.0)
      - [**Agile Roadmap:** New features (e.g., prompt auto-organizer) are shipped quickly based on team feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=2857.0)
  - [**OS (formerly Atlas) Rewrite:**](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=3170.0)
      - [A major rewrite is underway for a March release, improving the UI and workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=3188.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**All Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
      - [Adopt the "compounding growth engine" narrative to explain the value of GrowthX beyond simple content production.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
      - [Onboard to Check That via the Notion guide.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=2747.0)
  - [**Nigel:**](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=2789.0)
      - [Manually email new Check That signups while the RevOps system is built.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=2789.0)
  - [**Daniel's Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=2820.0)
      - [Ship the prompt auto-organizer feature for Check That.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=2895.0)
      - [Continue the OS rewrite for a March release.](https://fathom.video/share/AwC6x3H1p4tm9QCUeQw7WB_MefEXvGq3?tab=summary&timestamp=3188.0)
